title: atropa lethalis
intro: Atropa lethalis, also known as deadly nightshade, is a poisonous plant species in the Solanaceae family. The plant's medicinal properties have been utilized in traditional medicine, particularly for its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Atropa lethalis include reducing muscle spasms and relieving pain, as well as its potential in treating conditions such as epilepsy and rheumatism. Herbal preparations of Atropa lethalis are typically made from its berries or leaves, often used in homeopathic remedies and teas, although caution is advised due to its toxic properties.
